summary: Successfully tested 'إكمال جميع الطلبات' (Complete All Orders) batch checkout feature. Backend API /api/food/orders/batch works correctly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend UI correctly shows batch checkout button when 2+ stores in cart and navigates to FoodBatchCheckoutPage successfully.

feature_1_batch_checkout_button.description: زر 'إكمال جميع الطلبات' يظهر في FoodMyCartPage عندما يكون هناك متجرين أو أكثر

tests.test: Button visibility with 2 stores in cart
tests.result: Button appears with text 'إكمال جميع الطلبات (2 متجر)'
Shows 'سائق واحد سيجمع جميع طلباتك ويوصلها دفعة واحدة'

feature_2_batch_checkout_page.description: صفحة FoodBatchCheckoutPage تعرض ملخص جميع الطلبات بشكل صحيح

tests.result: Shows 'ملخص الطلبات (2 متجر)' with both stores and items
Shows 'طلب مجمع - سائق واحد' with explanation
Shows saved addresses and option to add new
Shows wallet and cash payment options
Correctly shows 145,000 ل.س with free delivery
Successfully creates orders from 2 stores with batch_id
Orders appear in /my-orders with batch_id, batch_index, batch_total

critical_code_review_comments: FoodMyCartPage.js: Correctly shows batch checkout button only when stores.length > 1 (line 356)
FoodMyCartPage.js: data-testid='checkout-all-btn' correctly added for testing
FoodBatchCheckoutPage.js: Properly handles batch order submission to /api/food/orders/batch
food_orders.py: POST /batch endpoint correctly creates multiple orders with shared batch_id

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All batch checkout UI features working

seed_data_creation: Used existing food stores in Damascus (مطعم الشام, مطعم البيت الدمشقي) and their products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch checkout feature is fully functional. To test: 1) Add items from 2+ stores to food cart 2) Navigate to /food/my-cart 3) Verify 'إكمال جميع الطلبات' button appears 4) Click to go to /food/batch-checkout 5) Complete order. API endpoint: POST /api/food/orders/batch. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_food_batch_orders.py
